---
name: General technical issue
about: A technical issue that does not fit the Bug / Feature / GUI templates
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

<!-- This issue tracker is only for technical issues related to Rincoin Core.

General Rincoin questions, support requests, and community discussion
are best directed to the official channels listed at https://rincoin.org.

For reporting security issues, please do NOT open a public issue.
Refer to SECURITY.md in the repository root for the disclosure process
and the security contact (info@rincoin.org, GPG-encrypted preferred).

If the node is "stuck" during sync or giving "block checksum mismatch"
errors, please ensure your hardware is stable by running memtest and
observe CPU temperature with a load-test tool such as linpack before
creating an issue.

Note: Rincoin Core is a single integrated repository (consensus, node,
wallet, and GUI). There is no separate GUI repository; GUI-related
issues should use the GUI template or be opened here with the "GUI"
label. -->

<!-- Describe the issue -->
<!--- What behavior did you expect? -->

<!--- What was the actual behavior (provide screenshots if the issue is GUI-related)? -->

<!--- How reliably can you reproduce the issue, what are the steps to do so? -->

<!-- What version of Rincoin Core are you using, where did you get it
     (rincoin.org release, GitHub release, self-compiled from source, etc.)?
     If self-compiled, please include the commit hash. -->

<!-- What type of machine are you observing the error on
     (OS / CPU architecture / disk type)? -->

<!-- GUI-related issue? What is your operating system and its version?
     If Linux, what is your desktop environment and graphical shell
     (e.g., GNOME on Wayland, KDE Plasma on X11)? -->

<!-- Network: are you running on mainnet, testnet, or regtest?
     Are you connected to any custom seeds or peers (-addnode / -connect)? -->

<!-- Any extra information that might be useful in the debugging process. -->
<!--- This is normally the contents of a `debug.log` or `config.log` file.
      Raw text or a link to a pastebin-type site are preferred.
      Please redact any IP addresses, wallet addresses, or other
      identifying information before posting. -->
